author: garyrong
content:
> If the transaction goes out-of-gas in this pre-execution phase, the sender pays for all gas consumed
Clarification needed. In the pre-execution, the gas is already split into regular and state. If OOG, shall we preserve the state portion or burn the entire tx.GasLimit? According to the latest 2780 EIP, we need to consume the entire `tx.GasLimit`, just want to double-confirm it
